messageValues.message:
=أنت خبير في تحليل المحتوى التقني وهندسة الذكاء الاصطناعي. مهمتك هي تلخيص نصوص فيديوهات اليوتيوب التعليمية بدقة عالية.
عند استلام النص، قم بصياغة المخرجات باللغة العربية بتنسيق Markdown كالتالي:

📌 العنوان الرئيسي
(اكتب عنوان الفيديو بشكل جذاب)

🎯 الهدف من الفيديو
(سطر واحد يوضح القيمة الأساسية التي سيخرج بها المشاهد)

📝 النقاط الجوهرية (Key Insights)
استخدم نقاطاً واضحة لشرح المفاهيم التقنية (مثل الفرق بين الـ Workflow والـ Agent).

ركز على المصطلحات التقنية الهامة.

💡 الخلاصة والتوصية
(نصيحة عملية بناءً على ما ورد في الفيديو).

ملاحظة: إذا كان النص يحتوي على كود برمجى أو أدوات (مثل Anthropic أو n8n)، اذكرها بوضوح.

parameters.content:
## 🔗 Basic LLM Chain + Google Gemini

**What it does:**
Sends the video title and transcript to Google Gemini and receives a structured Arabic summary in Markdown format.

**Prompt output format:**
- 📌 Main title
- 🎯 Video objective
- 📝 Key technical insights
- 💡 Conclusion and recommendation

**Model:** Google Gemini (via PaLM API)
**Language:** Arabic

**To change language:** Edit the system message in the Basic LLM Chain node.
**To change model:** Swap the Gemini sub-node for OpenAI, Claude, or any other LangChain-compatible model.

## 🌐 HTTP Request

**What it does:**
Calls the YouTube Transcript API to fetch the full video transcript and metadata (title, publish date, etc.).

**API used:** youtube-transcript.io
**Method:** POST
**Auth:** Basic (API key in Authorization header)

**Key output fields used downstream:**
- `text` — full transcript text
- `title` — video title
- `id` — video ID (for URL construction)
- `microformat.playerMicroformatRenderer.publishDate` — publish date

**Note:** Replace the Authorization header value with your own API key.

## 🔧 Code in JavaScript

**What it does:**
Extracts the 11-character YouTube Video ID from any URL format submitted in the form.

**Supported formats:**
- Standard watch links (`v=`)
- Short links (`youtu.be/`)
- Embed links (`embed/`)
- Shorts (`shorts/`)
- vi links (`vi/`)

**Output fields:**
- `videoId` — the extracted 11-char ID
- `originalUrl` — the original URL as submitted

**Error handling:**
Throws a clear Arabic error if the ID cannot be extracted.

## 📋 On Form Submission

**What it does:**
Provides a simple web form where the user pastes a YouTube URL and submits it to start the workflow.

**Form field:**
`Video Link` — accepts any YouTube URL format:
- `youtube.com/watch?v=...`
- `youtu.be/...`
- `youtube.com/shorts/...`
- `youtube.com/embed/...`

**How to access the form:**
Click the node → copy the Production URL and open it in any browser.

## 🎬 YouTube Video Summarizer

Submit any YouTube URL via the form and get:
- 🤖 An AI-generated Arabic summary (Gemini)
- ✈️ Summary delivered to Telegram instantly
- 🗄️ Summary + metadata saved to Notion DB

**Flow:**
Form → Extract Video ID → Fetch Transcript → AI Summary → Telegram + Notion

**To customize:**
- Change the language/format in the LLM prompt (Basic LLM Chain)
- Swap Google Gemini for any other model
- Update the Notion database ID and property names

## ✈️ Send a text message

**What it does:**
Sends the AI-generated summary directly to a Telegram chat as a text message.

**Sends:** The full `text` output from the LLM Chain.

**Note:** Telegram messages have a 4096-character limit.
If summaries are being cut off, add a Set node before this one to trim: `$json.text.substring(0, 4000)`

## 🗄️ Create a database page

**What it does:**
Creates a new page in the Notion database with the video's metadata and AI summary.

**Properties written:**
- `Title` — video title (from transcript API)
- `URL` — full YouTube watch link
- `Summary` — first 1990 chars of AI summary
- `Date` — original video publish date

**Note:** Notion rich_text fields are limited to 2000 characters. The summary is trimmed to 1990 + '...' to stay within limits.

**To change the database:** Update the Database ID in this node's settings.
